title: Linux Log File Tampering
description: Detects deletion, truncation, or clearing of system log files. Attackers tamper with logs to cover their tracks and hinder incident response.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*rm -f /var/log*' or msg like '*rm -rf /var/log*' or msg like '*truncate -s 0 /var/log*' or msg like '*cat /dev/null > /var/log*' or msg like '*shred /var/log*' or msg like '*journalctl --vacuum*')))
